data.title: Coeur Mining to present at upcoming conferences. CEO to present at John Tumazos Very Independent Research Virtual Metals Conference on Oct 7, 2025.
data.description: A company based in Chicago, Coeur Mining, Inc. (NYSE: CDE), shared details about their executives' participation in upcoming investor conferences. Mitchell J. Krebs, the Chairman, President, and CEO, is set to present at the John Tumazos Very Independent Research Virtual Metals Conference on October 7, 2025. Additionally, Thomas S. Whelan, the Senior VP and CFO, along with another Senior VP and Chief Officer will also be in attendance. This information was disclosed today by the company.

data.title: AHF's 'Out of the Closet' Thrift Stores mark 35 years in celebration on Oct. 4th from 10 am to 2 pm in Atwater Village.
data.description: Los Angeles - AHF's 'Out of the Closet' thrift stores are commemorating 35 years with a special event on Saturday, October 4th from 10 am to 2 pm in Atwater Village.

data.title: Law firm investigates data breach at Superior Vision Service; breach discovered on July 11, 2025.
data.description: An investigation is currently underway by Edelson Lechtzin LLP, a renowned national class action law firm, into data privacy claims related to a security incident at Superior Vision Service. The breach was discovered by Superior Vision Service around July 11, 2025. For more information on this matter, individuals are encouraged to reach out to the law firm.

data.title: Community Healthcare Trust (NYSE: CHCT) will announce Q3 2025 results on Oct 28 and host conference call on Oct 29 at 9:00 am CT.
data.description: Franklin, Tennessee - On October 3, 2025, Community Healthcare Trust Incorporated revealed that they will disclose their third quarter 2025 financial results on October 28, 2025, after the market closes. The announcement is set to occur at 9:00 a.m. Central Time the following day, October 29, 2025. The company, listed as CHCT on the NYSE, will provide crucial insights and data, contributing to the understanding of its performance and standing in the market.

data.title: eHealth, Inc. (EHTH) grants inducement restricted stock units as announced on Oct. 1, 2025 under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).
data.description: In Austin, Texas, on October 3, 2025, eHealth, Inc. (Nasdaq: EHTH) disclosed that the Compensation Committee of its Board of Directors approved an inducement restricted grant on October 1, 2025. eHealth, Inc., a prominent private online health insurance marketplace operating at ehealth.com, made the announcement.

data.title: Sachin Tendulkar and NCL Chairman ring NYSE bell before NCL Tournament, bringing cricket to Wall Street.
data.description: Just before the start of the cricket match in Texas, a prominent figure in the cricket world has signed up with the latest American league, aiming to shift the focus of the sport from Wall Street to the sports arena. This move has brought significant attention to the National Cricket League on the global stage. The grand event took place on October 3, 2025, with Dallas and New York playing crucial roles in this development.

data.title: Avis Budget Group to announce Q3 2025 results on Oct 27, followed by conference call on Oct 28.
data.description: A conference call has been set for October 28th, 2025, to discuss the latest results. This call will be a platform for stakeholders to review and analyze key figures and statistics pertaining to the company's performance. Investors and analysts are encouraged to participate in this significant event. Mark your calendars for the insightful discussion set to take place on that date.

data.title: Context Therapeutics grants 30,000 stock options to new employee under Nasdaq rule, a biopharmaceutical company focusing on T cell bispecific antibodies for solid tumors.
data.description: On October 3, 2025, Context Therapeutics Inc. revealed that the company has issued non-qualified stock options for the purchase of 30,000 shares of its common stock to a recently hired employee. Context, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical firm on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol CNTX, specializes in developing T cell engaging bispecific antibodies tailored for solid tumor treatment. This move was considered essential in attracting the new employee to join the company's workforce.

data.title: AMH (NYSE: AMH) to release Q3 2025 results on Oct 29, 2025. Leading owner of single-family rental homes. #EarningsRelease
data.description: On October 3, 2025, in Las Vegas, AMH (NYSE: AMH), a prominent company specializing in owning, operating, and developing single-family rental homes, revealed plans to disclose its financial and operating performance for the third quarter of 2025 on Wednesday, October 29, 2025, post...
